markdownRemark.html:
I really love to collect and read books. Sometimes I lend them to friends and often forget about them later on. That's where this piece of software comes into play: My attempt on a program that focuses on just one simple thing- Keeping track of my book collection!

It's written in electron and plain javascript/HTML/CSS, after I saw this video from Traversy Media.

See the source code here: https://github.com/v-glb/myLibrary
